explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: An alliance mentions AI security, governance, and automated compliance. The described AI solution references a policy commitment to responsible AI practices.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This article, "How AI is Transforming Manufacturing Mid-Market Companies," provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. It highlights an alliance that mentions "AI security, governance, and automated compliance," indicating a policy commitment to responsible AI practices within the described AI solution.
relevant_sources.title: How AI is Transforming Manufacturing Mid-Market Companies

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Graphic Packaging's published materials reference a policy commitment to responsible AI practices within a described AI solution, with an alliance also mentioning AI security, governance, and automated compliance. These disclosures address governance, which is the only responsible AI pillar with documented evidence out of 7 evaluated areas. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 5 publicly available sources.
